Good Health and Well-being.reason: Course explicitly aims to '增進體適能', '促進身心發展', '培養運動習慣', and '了解羽球運動傷害的預防與保健', directly aligning with Target 3.4 on promoting mental health and well-being through prevention.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides tertiary education (Target 4.3). It also fosters skill development, teamwork, and healthy lifestyles ('豐實休閒生活'), contributing to relevant learning outcomes and sustainable lifestyles (Target 4.7).
